title: Strict Quality Toolchain
progress: Turns the quality-tooling questions into an enforceable track: basedpyright versus ty versus mypy, Renovate activation, Pydantic v2 posture, coverage thresholds, edge/property/mutation tests, Scalene profiling, and strict CI/CD controls.
output: A strict, measurable CI and local quality stack with documented type-checker posture, dependency automation, coverage and profiling evidence
